nasb.text: The righteous will rejoice when he sees the vengeance; He will wash his feet in the blood of the wicked.

esv.text: The righteous will rejoice when he sees the vengeance; he will bathe his feet in the blood of the wicked.

cnv.text: 義人看見仇敵遭報就歡喜； 他要在惡人的血中洗自己的腳。

ccb.text: 义人必因恶人遭报而欢欣， 并用恶人的血洗脚。

csbs.text: 义人看到恶人遭报就欢喜； 他要在恶人的血中洗自己的脚。
